markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the GrowthX engagement and discuss the client's new SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Engagement Ending:** The client will not renew the GrowthX contract, effective this week. The decision was driven by a strategic shift to in-house SEO, not by performance issues.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** The client is pausing mass AI content production to focus on a new website launch and create fewer, higher-quality, human-generated pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Asset Handoff:** GrowthX will export all SEO assets (Airtable, Notion docs) for the client's internal use.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Future Check-in:** The teams will reconnect in March to discuss the client's progress and potential future collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)

## Topics

### Client's New SEO Strategy

  - [**Rationale:** The client is pausing mass AI content production to realign its strategy, driven by a new website launch and a desire for higher-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**New Content Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Focus:** Fewer, more strategic pieces with SEO impact, written for sales enablement.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Generation:** Human-generated, with potential for AI assistance where a subject matter expert (e.g., Nick) is in the loop.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [**Tools:** The client has Aerofs and Profoundhouse but has not yet defined its AI workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

### Feedback on GrowthX Engagement

  - **Highlight:** The "AI role plays" solution page achieving the \#1 organic ranking.
      - [**Significance:** This tangible win validated the strategic work, as the page was far from the top when the engagement began.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [**Area for Improvement:** Strategic link building.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Proactive outreach to get the client featured in relevant third-party listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Contrast:** The current service focused on volume (e.g., "10 links") rather than strategic placement.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### Logistics & Handoff

  - [**Asset Export:** GrowthX will export all SEO assets (Airtable, Notion, strategy docs) for the client's internal use.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Outstanding Invoice:** A November invoice is pending. Jo will ping Sean on Slack; Garett will also follow up.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
      - [Export all SEO assets (Airtable, Notion, strategy docs) for the client.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Send a final summary on Slack by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
      - [Ping Sean on Slack regarding the outstanding invoice.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Garett (Client):**](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Follow up with Sean regarding the outstanding invoice.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Both Teams:**](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
      - [Reconnect in March to discuss the client's internal SEO progress.](https://fathom.video/share/JWU1iv7Bq9ZuzjWxgHFQhbjdnSwmzHKB?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
